title: stenotaphrum glabrum
intro: Stenotaphrum glabrum, also known as buffalo grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. The health benefits of Stenotaphrum glabrum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its full potential.
